data.title: Founder of Bridgewater Fund: Still holding BTC, but gold is more suitable for private holding and not taxed than BTC
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bridgewater Fund founder Ray Dalio talked about Bitcoin again in a recent podcast interview, and also mentioned the DeepSeek craze. He said that he saw currency depreciation through market trends, especially relative to gold, Bitcoin or other physical assets. More generally, all fiat currencies are depreciating, while gold, Bitcoin or other hard assets are relatively appreciating. Bitcoin or other digital assets are a topic worth discussing. Although commodities can hedge inflation, they do not have a storage function. People cannot hold oil or wheat for a long time as a wealth storage tool like holding gold or Bitcoin. 
In addition, he revealed that he still holds some Bitcoin, but it is far less than gold. Bitcoin is one of his diversified investments, but he prefers gold because gold has several unique advantages: it can flow freely between countries; central banks of various countries use it as a reserve asset; it is more difficult to regulate than Bitcoin and can be held more "privately"; and gold cannot be easily taxed, but Bitcoin is different-regulators know the transaction path of Bitcoin and it is easy to regulate and tax it.

data.title: DUO rose above 0.07 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 120%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: LBank market data shows: $DUO rose above 0.07USDT in 24 hours, reaching a maximum of 0.077USDT. The current price is 0.06USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 120%. Since the launch of LBank, the current market value is approximately 6 million US dollars.

data.title: LBank has launched LIBRA U-margined perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank has launched the LIBRA U-based perpetual contract at 13:30 (SGT) on February 15, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.

data.title: A dormant address holding 300 BTC has become active again after nearly 11 years
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Whale Alert monitoring, a dormant address containing 300 BTC (US$29,368,562) was just activated after 10.9 years.

data.title: Dormant Bitcoin Address Activated After Over A Decade
data.description: According to Odaily, a dormant Bitcoin address containing 300 BTC, valued at approximately $29,368,562, has been activated after remaining inactive for 10.9 years. This activity was detected by Whale Alert, a service that monitors large cryptocurrency transactions.

data.title: A certain address bought $2.5 million of LIBRA and lost $2.1 million after liquidation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The Data Nerd monitored that 5 hours ago, address 62KQa bought 659,000 LIBRA at a price of 2.5 million US dollars (average entry price of 3.79 US dollars). One hour later, he sold all at a price of 392,000 US dollars, with an actual loss of about 2.1 million US dollars (investment return rate -84.32%).

data.title: Solayer founder has announced the first member of the team behind LIBRA
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Solayer founder Chaofan Shou published the personal information of the first member of the international sales director of KIP Protocol, the team behind LIBRA, on the X platform.
Earlier news said that Solayer founder and engineer lost more than 2 million US dollars due to LIBRA and said they would take action.
